---
name: Epic
about: A tracking epic spanning multiple issues
title: "EPIC N — <name>"
labels: epic
---

**Goal:** <one or two lines>

**Scope:** <what's in / out>

**Definition of Done:**
- [ ] All sub-issues closed
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy -D warnings`, `cargo test --workspace` green
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Each issue propagated its successor spec; next epic's issues filed

### Sub-issues
- [ ] #
